bead.title: bench-pr-A3: runner concurrency, in-flight state, signal cleanup, and budget halting
bead.description:
PROBLEM: The new bash runner needs production lifecycle controls for concurrent cells, process-group cleanup, Harbor container cleanup, shared in-flight state, and budget caps before it can replace the Go execution path. Governing artifact: plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification. Dependency ID: fizeau-163efede. Sibling dependency: expects A2 runner core to exist, but this child must add isolated fake-task tests so its behavior is verifiable without spending real model budget.
ROOT CAUSE: cmd/bench/matrix.go:1 centralizes run lifecycle in the old Go runner, so the new scripts/benchmark/benchmark entry point has no bash-owned flock, setsid, signal, in-flight, or budget implementation.
PROPOSED FIX: Extend scripts/benchmark/benchmark with background-job pooling capped by --jobs. Read concurrency-group YAML through yq -o=json and acquire per-group flock locks at ${FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR:-${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/fizeau-benchmark}/locks/<group>.lock. Launch each cell under setsid and track process groups. Maintain ${FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR}/<hostname>/in-flight.json under flock: prune dead PIDs on read, append the cell at start, record current in-flight count into the cell, and remove on close. Add SIGINT/SIGTERM traps that stop accepting new cells, send SIGTERM to each in-flight cell process group, docker stop each in-flight harbor-runner container, wait 30 seconds, send SIGKILL if needed, write final_status=interrupted with process_outcome=killed and no metrics to in-flight cells, and exit non-zero. Add budget accounting: compute cost_usd_at_run_time per cell from profile.pricing and token streams at close, accumulate into <out>/budget.json, halt before the next cell when --max-cost-usd would be exceeded, and write budget_halted placeholder report.json files with process_outcome=setup_failed and a note field for skipped cells.
NON-SCOPE: cell-report.schema.json (PR B); final tasks_from / task_executor bench-set schema (PR C); Node collector (PR D); Node importers (PR E); deleting cmd/bench (PR F); docs beyond required local command help and existing redirect references (PR G). Do not change adapter contracts, Harbor image build logic, planning-mode Go behavior, parity fixtures, or Go runner deactivation in this child.
ROLLBACK: If interrupted, cell-state.json sentinels and in-flight.json stale entries are acceptable recovery anchors; the next runner read must prune dead PIDs.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestBenchmarkConcurrencyGroupFlockAndJobPool: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkConcurrencyGroupFlockAndJobPool verifies --jobs caps concurrent background cells, concurrency-group YAML is honored, per-group flock locks are acquired at the configured state path, and cells run under their own setsid process groups.
2. TestBenchmarkInFlightStateLifecycle: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkInFlightStateLifecycle verifies in-flight.json append/read/remove under flock, dead PID pruning, hostname scoping, and current in-flight count written into each cell.
3. TestBenchmarkBudgetHalt: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkBudgetHalt and ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark --profile sindri-lucebox --bench-set tb-2-1-canary --max-cost-usd 0.01 produce <out>/budget.json and at least one report.json with final_status=budget_halted, process_outcome=setup_failed, and note.
4. TestBenchmarkSignalInterruptionStopsContainers: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkSignalInterruptionStopsContainers and the manual gate './benchmark --profile sindri-lucebox --bench-set tb-2-1-canary & sleep 5; kill -TERM $!; wait; jq .final_status bench/results/.../report.json' verify interrupted final_status, process_outcome=killed, no metrics, docker stop for harbor-runner containers, SIGKILL after 30 seconds, and non-zero runner exit.
5. TestA3Gates: go test ./... and lefthook run pre-commit pass on a clean checkout.
